title: PAN MRI Processing Pipelines Anatomical
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e7otr","text":"The purpose of this document is to describe the Anatomical (ANAT) preprocessing pipelines used for the Magnetic Resonance (MR) Image data collected by the Precision Aging Network (PAN) Project. This document will primarily\nfocus on the preprocessing of the T1 weighted images collected using the MPRAGE protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
